commands.review_summary:
Removes the completed ClawScan cleanup actions and tests, then narrows Convex schema and scan-source validators to reject the deprecated note fields and `clawscan-note` source.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is the removal phase of a completed data migration and schema narrowing, not a report of broken runtime behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Explicit maintainer handling is required because the collaborator-authored PR narrows production data validators and requires an intentional backend deployment after merge.

target.title: chore: remove ClawScan cleanup migration
target.body:
## Summary
- Remove the temporary ClawScan cleanup maintenance actions and tests after production cleanup.
- Remove the temporary schema allowances for `clawScanNote`, `clawScanNoteUpdatedAt`, and `securityScanJobs.source = "clawscan-note"`.

## Production cleanup applied
- `packageReleases`: patched 203 rows.
- `skillVersions`: patched 689 rows.
- `securityScanJobs`: patched 68 rows from `clawscan-note` to `manual`.

## Tests
- `bunx convex deploy --dry-run --typecheck=disable -y`
- `bunx vitest run convex/maintenance.test.ts && bunx tsc -p packages/schema/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/clawhub/tsconfig.json --noEmit`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bun run ci:packages`

## Rollout
After merge, run the backend deploy workflow again. The production Convex dry-run already validated that documents match the narrowed schema.
target.author: patrick-erichsen
